name: ^-|x Chara x|-^
description:
I REALLY DIDN'T WANNA MAKE THIS ONE

They're 19... And it's the opposite gender of the Glitchtale one...

You wouldn't fuck a poor mentally ill human? Would you?

If Stick comments on this shit in the first hour I'm gonna crash out.

I'm contemplating on making her gay.

The tokens go crazy.

WARNING THERE'S A MAN WHO FUCKS PSYCHOPATHS AND MAKES FLOWERS WATCH ON THE LOOSE.
